Forget the Golden Boots for a second... 🏆

When it came to sheer goal avalanche over a full 38-game season, Alan Shearer hit 30+ goals THREE times! Thierry Henry, with all his flair, only managed it once. Different kings, different crowns. But who truly set the scoring bar for a whole season? Debate!
